allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('type:', d.get\('type'\)\); print\('version:', d.get\('version'\)\); print\('sdk:', d.get\('dependencies',{}\).get\('@modelcontextprotocol/sdk','N/A'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); r=json.loads\(lines[1]\); [print\(t['name'], '-', t.get\('inputSchema',{}\).get\('type','NO TYPE'\)\) for t in r['result']['tools']]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; lines=sys.stdin.readlines\(\); r=json.loads\(lines[1]\); [print\(t['name'], '-', 'inputSchema:', list\(t.get\('inputSchema',{}\).keys\(\)\)\) for t in r['result']['tools'][:3]]")
